title: StructureCraftX
description: Your plugin for generating custom structures!
body:
🌟 StructureCraftX – Build Smarter, Not Harder! StructureCraftX is a powerful Minecraft plugin designed to bring your building game to the next level. Automate structure placement, customize schematics, and craft massive builds with just a few clicks! Whether you’re a casual player or a server admin, StructureCraftX gives you the tools to build fast, build smart, and build EPIC. 🧱 Features: 📦 Load and place custom structures easily with commands 🏗️ Auto-build mode for instant construction ⚙️ Configurable build speed, cooldowns & limits 🌍 Compatible with most world types and protection plugins 🔐 Permission-based access for multiplayer control Perfect for survival servers, creative worlds, or minigame arenas – StructureCraftX turns ideas into reality in seconds! CONFIG: ``` # StructureCraft Configuration # List of worlds where structure generation is disabled disabled-worlds: - "world_nether" - "world_the_end" # Generation settings generation: # Base chance for any structure to spawn in a chunk (0.0 to 1.0) base-chance: 0.15 # Rarity weights (must add up to 1.0) rarity-weights: common: 0.7 rare: 0.25 epic: 0.05 # World radius for generation (in blocks) world-radius: 1000000 # Number of generation attempts per world attempts-per-world: 1000 # Chunks to process per server tick (higher = faster but more lag) chunks-per-tick: 5 debug: log-unknown-blocks: true ``` DEPENDENCY: WORLDEDIT!! MUST HAVE | Also the plugin ONLY supports .schem files.
